title: Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple
tagline: Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple (Malayalam: അവനവഞ്ചേരി ശ്രീ ഇണ്ടിളയപ്പൻ ക്ഷേത്രം) is a popular Hindu temple in Attingal of Thiruvananthapuram district, Kerala.
overview.description: Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple (Malayalam: അവനവഞ്ചേരി ശ്രീ ഇണ്ടിളയപ്പൻ ക്ഷേത്രം) is a popular Hindu temple in Attingal of Thiruvananthapuram district, Kerala. The temple is dedicated to Lord Indilayappan and is one of the oldest temples in the state of Kerala. Lord Indilayappan is worshipped by devotees for getting good health, courage and better life prospects. The primary deity of the temple is Lord Shiva and Umamaheswara.

topPlaces.name: Avanavancherry
topPlaces.description: Avanavancherry is a village in Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India. Avanavanchery is located near Attingal in Thiruvananthapuram District of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Attingal
topPlaces.description: Attingal is a municipality and a northern suburb of the Thiruvananthapuram Metropolitan Area, Kerala, India. It is the maternal home and ancestral residence of the Travancore Royal Family (Venad), and was ruled by the female royals (Attingal Ranis) as Attingal Thirumoopil Swaroopam under Travancore.

topPlaces.name: Chirayinkeezhu taluk
topPlaces.description: Chirayinkeezhu Taluk is a taluk in the district of Thiruvananthapuram in the Indian state of Kerala. It shares a land border with Varkala Taluk to the North and Thiruvananthapuram Taluk to the South.

topPlaces.name: Chirayinkeezhu
topPlaces.description: Chirayinkeezhu is a town in the Thiruvananthapuram district in the Indian state of Kerala. It was also the hometown of famous Malayalam film actor Prem Nazir.

items.note: Avanavancherry is a village in Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India. Avanavanchery is located near Attingal in Thiruvananthapuram District of Kerala.

Attingal is a municipality and a northern suburb of the Thiruvananthapuram Metropolitan Area, Kerala, India. It is the maternal home and ancestral residence of the Travancore Royal Family (Venad), and was ruled by the female royals (Attingal Ranis) as Attingal Thirumoopil Swaroopam under Travancore.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (25 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (26 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Avanavanchery Sri Indilayappan Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Avanavancherry, Attingal, Chirayinkeezhu taluk, Chirayinkeezhu, Mudakkal.
